# addEdge

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for addEdge

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useAddEdgeMutation(); mutate({ input: '<AddEdgeInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useAddEdgeMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useAddEdgeMutation();
mutate({ input: '<AddEdgeInput>' });
```
